text: All pains and distress are destroyed for those who remember the mighty Hanuman.
Grant me strength, intelligence and knowledge, remove my sorrows and shortcomings.
All joys are found in your refuge; with you as protector, there is no fear.
Victory to Hanuman, the ocean of wisdom and virtue. Victory to the Lord of Monkeys, illuminator of the three worlds.
Through your worship, one attains Rama and forgets the sorrows of many lifetimes.
